{ "name": "symfony/uid", "type": "library", "description": "Provides an object-oriented API to generate and represent UIDs", "keywords": ["uid", "uuid", "ulid"], "homepage": "https://symfony.com", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Grégoire Pineau", "email": "lyrixx@lyrixx.info" }, { "name": "Nicolas Grekas", "email": "p@tchwork.com" }, { "name": "Symfony Community", "homepage": "https://symfony.com/contributors" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.2", "symfony/polyfill-uuid": "^1.15" }, "require-dev": { "symfony/console": "^6.4|^7.0|^8.0" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Symfony\\Component\\Uid\\": "" }, "exclude-from-classmap": [ "/Tests/" ] }, "minimum-stability": "dev" }
